nasb.text: Now as He approached the gate of the city, a dead man was being carried out, the only son of his mother, and she was a widow; and a sizeable crowd from the city was with her.

esv.text: As he drew near to the gate of the town, behold, a man who had died was being carried out, the only son of his mother, and she was a widow, and a considerable crowd from the town was with her.

cnv.text: 他走近城門的時候，有人把一個死人抬出來，是個獨生子，他母親又是個寡婦。城裡有一大群人陪著她。

ccb.text: 耶稣快到城门口时，从城里走出一队送殡的人，死者是一个寡妇的独子，有许多城中的人陪着她。

csbs.text: 当他接近城门口的时候，看哪，有一个死人被抬出来了。这人是独生儿子，他的母亲又是寡妇。一大群城里的人陪着她。
